title: rubus tholeyroniamus
intro: Rubus tholeyroniamus is a lesser-known species of the Rubus genus, commonly referred to as the thorny bramble or tholeyron's raspberry. This plant is native to certain regions of the world and is known for its thorny canes and edible fruits, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Rubus tholeyroniamus include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin irritations. In terms of herbal preparations, the fruits of the plant can be used to make jams, jellies, and teas, while the leaves and roots can be dried and used to make infusions for medicinal purposes.
